extra.reason: Completed initial haxified Rust contract docs, linked profile docs, non-goals, capability map, and tracker sweep.

Added docs/metal-capability-fixtures.md with contract-first positive/negative fixture matrix, existing evidence, missing first-wave fixtures, harness owners, failure policy, and Beads mapping; linked it from the roadmap and docs index.

Added docs/metal-type-surface-gap-matrix.md with supported/partial/missing audit for rust.*, reflaxe.std, and hxrt/native type surfaces; linked it from the roadmap, docs index, and fixture plan; mapped priority gaps and follow-up Beads.

Implemented SurfaceContractRegistry and contract_report schema v5 with consumedSurfaces/nativeRepresentationPlan; guard now verifies deterministic Option/Result facade report entries. Residual Oracle follow-ups remain in sibling beads.

Implemented RuntimeRequirementAnalyzer with stable semantic reason taxonomy; runtime_plan schema v4 now emits deterministic runtimeRequirements and fallbackSummary with module/define attribution; metal policy guard verifies portable semantic reasons and no-hxrt non-blocking summary.

Added portable facade Option/Result Rust-output and contract-report fixtures, added Dynamic runtime fallback reason fixture coverage, documented that this first wave covers admitted reflaxe.std facades rather than blanket upstream Haxe stdlib native lowering, and verified snapshots plus full metal-policy/docs/path guards.

Added portable facade Option/Result output-shape gate in metal policy, documented the enforcement, and verified full metal policy plus codex-hxrust generated Cargo QA.
Documented that portable Vec lowering is deferred until an admitted collection facade exists, and clarified Array/rust.Vec/future reflaxe.std collection boundaries.

Extended scripts/ci/check-metal-policy.sh with the SocketAddr output-shape case, scoped/comment-stripped forbidden-token checks, generated call-site inspection, helper inspection, no-hxrt Cargo evidence, rustfmt/build/clippy/run proof, and full metal policy pass.

Added examples/metal_native_net for metal/no-hxrt TCP and UDP loopback through typed SocketAddr, updated README/examples matrix, and ran HARNESS_STAGES=examples bash scripts/ci/harness.sh successfully across compile-only and CI run matrices.

Updated README, FAQ, examples matrix, systems roadmap, metal capability/gap docs, native facade policy docs, root/std AGENTS directives, and Beads evidence; created follow-up beads haxe.rust-oo3.93 through haxe.rust-oo3.96; docs checks and guards passed.

M60 complete: typed loopback SocketAddr facade landed with strict native-facade policy, no-hxrt output-shape gate, public metal_native_net example, Oracle-approved follow-up beads, and validation evidence (focused cargo proof, full metal policy, examples harness, docs/guards, codex-hxrust smoke).

Implemented native facade helper manifest and growth guard. Added scripts/ci/native-facade-manifest-check.js, wired npm run guard:native-facade-manifest into hooks:check/hooks:check:full, and updated README, FAQ, docs index, native facade policy, roadmap/tracker docs, AGENTS.md, and std/AGENTS.md. Lifecycle native facade review recorded in docs/native-facade-policy.md. Current helper classifications remain: process/file/TCP/UDP/socket-error as permanent-native-facade and SocketAddr as lowering-candidate. Tightened metal policy evidence for CommandChild stdin.take/write_all and kill-then-wait lifecycle shape. No missing current-helper evidence was normalized as runtime behavior; app-facing live Rust-native file handles remain an explicit non-goal until a future contract-first bead scopes them.

Graduated SocketAddr pure behavior into compiler lowering. SocketAddr.localhost/localhostDetailed now emit single-evaluation port validation with u16::try_from, direct std::net::SocketAddrV4 loopback construction, and SocketAddr::from_std wrapping; SocketAddr.port now lowers through as_std().port(). native_socket_addr_tools.rs is retained only for the private std::net::SocketAddr wrapper and crate-private conversions used by TCP/UDP helpers. Updated the native facade manifest/policy and metal systems/type-surface docs. Validation passed: targeted socket-address metal policy case, npm run hooks:check, bash scripts/ci/check-metal-policy.sh, npm run test:codex-hxrust.
